top_classes.name: Fowlers Gap, western New South Wales, AustraliaHewson(1998) PhD thesis

Parent material consists of aeolian silts/clays and sandstone debris.Physiography: Alluvium along creek on footslopes of sandstone (Nundooka Sandstone) outcropping hills Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jpl.nicolet.soil.aridisol.none.unsorted.fgg009.spectrum.txt

Parent material consists of chiefly aeolian silts/clays. Physiography: Resistant quartzite ridges/hilltops. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jpl.nicolet.soil.aridisol.none.unsorted.fgg018.spectrum.txt
Parent material consists of phyllite, some calcrete deposits Physiography: Low relief valley. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jpl.nicolet.soil.aridisol.none.unsorted.fgg024.spectrum.txt
Parent material consists of limestone/calcareous shale.Physiography: Low relief valley. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jpl.nicolet.soil.aridisol.none.unsorted.fgt017.spectrum.txt

Parent material consists of phyllite and shale grits with some quartz-rich sands deposited as alluviumPhysiography: Floodplain outwash along ephemeral watercourse. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jpl.nicolet.soil.entisol.none.unsorted.fgg003.spectrum.txt

Parent material consists of aeolian silts/clays and sandstone debris.Physiography: Alluvium along creek on footslopes of sandstone (Nundooka Sandstone) outcropping hills Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jpl.nicolet.soil.entisol.none.unsorted.fgg007.spectrum.txt

Parent material consists of aeolian silts/clays and sandstone debris. Red-orange loam.Physiography: Depositional erosional scald along footslopes of sandstone hillslopes (Nundooka Sandstone). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jpl.nicolet.soil.entisol.none.unsorted.fgg008.spectrum.txt

Parent material consists of quartz-rich sandstone Physiography: Floodplain outwash along ephemeral watercourse. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jpl.nicolet.soil.entisol.none.unsorted.fg027.spectrum.txt

Parent material consists of aeolian silts/clays and sandstone debris.Physiography: Floodplain outwash from sandstone hillslopes. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jpl.nicolet.soil.entisol.none.unsorted.fgg033.spectrum.txt

Parent material consists of aeolian silts/clays and sandstone/quartz pebble/ironstone gravel.Physiography: Gilgai (expansive clay) landforms on floodplain. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jpl.nicolet.soil.entisol.none.unsorted.fgg036.spectrum.txt
